title: Transferring Grants and Contracts — D-RED Seminar Slides (Zhang)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-10-12 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Transferring Grants and Contracts' presented by Ailing Zhang, MS. Co-session with form_subaward_process_slides ('Subawards at Morgan State University' by Matthew Lee). Covers transferring an active award between institutions when faculty move.
